title: deep-docs last-scan payload v1.1
description: Authoritative payload schema for deep-docs last-scan envelope (artifact_kind=last-scan, schema.version=1.1). Additive minor bump over v1.0 for deep-docs v1.4.0 document-authoring: adds `payload.gaps[]` (missing/thin doc gap detection with authoring_spec), `payload.summary.authoring` (authoring gap count), the `missing-doc`/`thin-doc` issue `type` values, and the `authoring` issue `category`. All v1.0 shapes remain valid. Forward-compat additions use `^x-*` patternProperties; further breaking changes require a v2.0 schema file.

provenance.description: Plugin-internal provenance for cache/reuse decisions. NOT the envelope-level provenance.

is_git.description: Whether the scanned root is a git repository (affects reuse gate).

worktree_hash.description: Optional content-hash for non-git roots (path_check_enabled fallback).

path_check_enabled.description: Optional. Emitted only when scan-filters/cli-whitelist.md $PATH check is ON (`true`); omitted when OFF. Used by reuse 4-factor rule to compare prov.path_check_enabled vs config.enable_path_check. Per claude-deep-docs@3cc5229 doc-scanner.md.

type.description: Issue type. v1.0 values: dead-reference, moved-path, stale-example, duplicate-block, size-warning. v1.1 adds the authoring gap types: missing-doc, thin-doc. Free-form (minLength 1) for forward-compat with future heuristics.

category.description: v1.1 adds `authoring` for document-generation gaps (missing-doc/thin-doc) alongside the v1.0 auto-fix/audit-only split.

gaps.description: v1.1 — document-authoring gaps. Each entry is a missing or thin document that authoring (`/deep-docs` generate/restructure) can create or expand. Distinct from `documents[].issues[]` because a gap has no source document to attach to.

type.description: missing-doc — the target document does not exist; thin-doc — it exists but is below the substance threshold.

target_path.description: Repo-relative path of the document to create or expand (e.g. ARCHITECTURE.md).

exists.description: Whether target_path currently exists on disk. false ⇒ missing-doc; true ⇒ thin-doc.

evidence.description: Why this gap was flagged (e.g. '12k LOC, no ARCHITECTURE.md').

authoring_spec.description: The authoring recipe used to generate/restructure the document.

doc_kind.description: Document archetype to author (e.g. architecture-md, claude-md, agents-md).

mode.description: create — generate a new document; restructure — rewrite/expand an existing thin document.

rationale.description: Human-readable justification for the authoring action.

authoring.description: v1.1 — count of authoring gaps (matches gaps[].length). Optional for forward-compat with payloads that detected no gaps.
